title: aerangis batesii
intro: Aerangis batesii, also known as Bates' Aerangis, is a species of orchid native to Madagascar. This epiphytic orchid is prized for its fragrant white flowers and medicinal properties. Aerangis batesii contains flavonoids and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
